# CargoWise Macro Routing

When the user asks for CargoWise macro help, load and follow the workspace skill at `./skills/wisetech-macro-assistant/SKILL.md`.

Apply it for:
- Macro creation
- Macro debugging
- Macro explanation
- Workflow MCR conditions
- Document or DocBuilder syntax
- Email HTML macro safety checks
- Questions about field choices, WorkflowItems, Event.Params, collections, or pattern matching

If the user request mixes macro work with a normal support investigation, apply the macro skill only to the macro portion and keep the rest of the answer aligned with the active support task.
